name: OmopImmunizationDrugExposureView
title: Immunization → drug_exposure (flat)
description: One FHIR Immunization maps to one drug_exposure row. Immunizations are point-in-time events: start_date = end_date, no days_supply or refills. Records are distinguished from other drug exposures by drug_concept_id belonging to the CVX vocabulary. Only completed immunizations are mapped; entered-in-error and not-done are skipped.

column.name: drug_exposure_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Hash/sequence/lookup of Immunization.id. HL7 IG FML comments this out as a TODO.

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer. Skip the entire record if the referenced Patient does not exist.

column.name: drug_concept_id
column.description: Map vaccine code (CVX/SNOMED/ATC/RxNorm) to OMOP standard concept. When multiple vaccineCode.coding[] entries are present, pick the first recognized vocabulary. Default 0 when concept lookup unavailable.

column.name: drug_exposure_start_date
column.description: Vaccination date (date portion). Skip record if occurrenceString is used instead of occurrenceDateTime. — transform: date(Immunization.occurrenceDateTime)

column.name: drug_exposure_end_date
column.description: Same as start date -- immunizations are single point-in-time events. — transform: date(Immunization.occurrenceDateTime)

column.name: stop_reason
column.description: Only when status = not-done. omoponfhir writes statusReason.text or coded system:code. Most implementations skip not-done records entirely.

column.name: sig
column.description: omoponfhir concatenates note[].text into sig. Not standard practice -- sig is intended for prescriber instructions, not clinical notes. Most implementations leave null.

column.name: route_concept_id
column.description: Vaccine administration route mapped to OMOP concept. Common: IM->4302612, SC->4302357, PO->4132161, NASINHL->4262914.

column.name: route_source_value
column.description: Raw route code. omoponfhir uses system:code:display format. HL7 IG FML uses route.text as fallback.

column.name: lot_number
column.description: Vaccine lot tracking. One of the few FHIR resources that maps to lot_number. Truncate if exceeds 50 characters.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: Administering practitioner. Take the first performer[].actor. Optional -- null if unresolvable. HL7 IG FML comments this out; ETL-German does not map it.

column.name: visit_occurrence_id
column.description: Resolve Encounter reference. Optional -- null if Encounter does not exist.

column.name: drug_source_value
column.description: Original vaccine code string. omoponfhir uses system:code format. ETL-German uses just the code.

column.name: drug_source_concept_id
column.description: Non-standard source concept ID from vocabulary lookup. ETL-German resolves via findOmopConcepts. Default 0.

column.name: dose_unit_source_value
column.description: Dose unit (e.g., 'mL', 'dose'). HL7 IG FML uses doseQuantity.code. ETL-German uses dose.getUnit().
